title: S + should have + p.p.（過去應該做而沒做）

formulas.zh: 主詞應該做某事（過去），但實際沒做；表示對過去行為的責備、遺憾或後悔

formulas.formula: S + should/ought to + have + p.p. + (time expression)
formulas.zh: 加入時間副詞，強調過去特定時刻應該做但未做的事

explanation: 此句型由情態動詞 should/ought to 加完成式構成，用於表達對過去行為的責備、遺憾或否定評價。結構為：should/ought to + have + 過去分詞。主要用於：(1)責備他人未履行責任，(2)表達自我悔恨，(3)提出建議性批評。注意 should have 和 ought to have 意義相同，但 should 更常用且更自然。不可與現在簡單式或現在進行式混用，避免時態錯誤。

examples.eng: You should have studied harder before the exam instead of playing games.
examples.chi: 你本應該在考試前更努力讀書，而不是玩遊戲。

examples.eng: She ought to have told him the truth from the beginning.
examples.chi: 她從一開始就應該告訴他真相。

examples.eng: We should have arrived earlier, but the traffic was terrible.
examples.chi: 我們應該早點到達，但交通太糟糕了。

examples.eng: He should have listened to his parents' advice about his career.
examples.chi: 他應該聽他父母關於職涯的建議。

extension.tip: 判斷此句型的關鍵是識別過去時間背景與後悔/責備情感。若句子強調過去應做但未做的事，優先選用此句型。避免與 'would have + p.p.'（虛擬條件）混淆，should have 是直接評價，would have 是假設情境。注意 have 後必須是過去分詞，不能是動詞原形。

examples.test: You should have gone to the party last night.
examples.result: ✓ 正確。表達責備或遺憾，have + gone 為過去分詞形式。

examples.test: You should go to the party last night.
examples.result: ✗ 錯誤。time expression 為過去時，應使用完成式，改為 should have gone。

examples.test: If you had studied harder, you would have passed the exam.
examples.result: → 虛擬條件句，與 should have 不同；強調假設情境下的後果。

extension.note: 「應該做但沒做」用 should have + p.p.，聽到過去時間詞立即想到完成式結構。

parts: called you earlier, but my phone was dead.
exercises.sentence: I should have called you earlier, but my phone was dead.
exercises.translation: 我應該早點打電話給你，但我的手機沒電了。

parts: informed us about the change in schedule.
exercises.sentence: They ought to have informed us about the change in schedule.
exercises.translation: 他們應該通知我們日程的改變。

parts: that her decision was wrong instead of defending it stubbornly.
exercises.sentence: She should have admitted that her decision was wrong instead of defending it stubbornly.
exercises.translation: 她應該承認她的決定是錯的，而不是固執地為之辯護。

parts: more time preparing for the presentation before the deadline.
exercises.sentence: We should have spent more time preparing for the presentation before the deadline.
exercises.translation: 在截止日期前，我們應該花更多時間準備簡報。
